title: Fallout 4 : Game Of The Year Edition
description: Fallout 4 is a 2015 action role-playing game developed by Bethesda Game Studios and published by Bethesda Softworks.
platforms: PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Windows PC
genres: Action role-playing game, Fighting game, Third-person shooter

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is a 2015 action role-playing game developed and published by CD Projekt.
platforms: PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Windows PC
genres: Action role-playing game, Fighting game, Action-adventure game, Nonlinear gameplay

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: An epic tale of life in America’s unforgiving heartland. The game's vast and atmospheric world also provides the foundation for a brand new online multiplayer experience.

title: Minecraft
description: Explore infinite worlds and build everything from the simplest of homes to the grandest of castles. Play in creative mode with unlimited resources or mine deep into the world in survival mode.
platforms: Windows PC, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, Mobile

title: Grand Theft Auto V
description: When a young street hustler, a retired bank robber, and a terrifying psychopath find themselves entangled with the criminal underworld, they must pull off a series of dangerous heists.
platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, Windows PC
genres: Action-adventure game, Open world, Third-person shooter

title: Elden Ring
description: Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between.
platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, Windows PC
genres: Action role-playing game, Open world, Soulslike

title: Cyberpunk 2077
description: An open-world, action-adventure RPG set in the megalopolis of Night City, where you play as a cyberpunk mercenary wrapped up in a fight for survival.
platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, Windows PC

title: God of War Ragnarök
description: Kratos and Atreus must journey to each of the Nine Realms in search of answers as Asgardian forces prepare for a prophesied battle.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
description: In the late 13th century, the Mongol empire has laid waste to entire nations. Jin Sakai must go beyond samurai traditions to protect what's left.

title: Terraria
description: Dig, fight, explore, build! Nothing is impossible in this action-packed adventure game. The world is your canvas and the ground itself is your paint.
platforms: Windows PC, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch

title: Hollow Knight
description: Forge your own path in Hollow Knight! An epic action adventure through a vast ruined kingdom of insects and heroes.

title: Forza Horizon 5
description: Your ultimate Horizon adventure awaits! Explore the vibrant and ever-evolving open world landscapes of Mexico with limitless driving action.

title: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
description: Explore late 1500s Sengoku Japan as you come face to face with larger than life foes in a dark and twisted world.

title: Resident Evil 4
description: Survival is just the beginning. Six years have passed since the biological disaster in Raccoon City. Leon S. Kennedy tracks the president's kidnapped daughter to a secluded European village.
platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, Windows PC

title: Counter-Strike 2
description: For over two decades, Counter-Strike has offered an elite competitive experience. Now the next chapter of the CS saga begins with Counter-Strike 2.

title: It Takes Two
description: Embark on the craziest journey of your life in It Takes Two, a genre-bending platform adventure created purely for co-op.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man Remastered
description: Peter Parker’s worlds collide in an original action-packed story. Play as an experienced Spider-Man, fighting big crime in Marvel’s New York.

title: Street Fighter 6
description: Powered by Capcom’s proprietary RE ENGINE, the Street Fighter 6 experience spans across three distinct game modes: World Tour, Fighting Ground and Battle Hub.
platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, Windows PC

title: EA Sports FC 26
description: The latest installment in the world's game, featuring more realism, updated rosters, and the new Career Mode enhancements.
platforms: PS5, Xbox Series X/S, Windows PC, Nintendo Switch

title: Fortnite
description: The ultimate battle royale and social hub. Build, fight, and create in a constantly evolving world that includes racing, music festivals, and LEGO adventures.

title: Assassin's Creed Odyssey
description: Choose your fate in Ancient Greece and evolve from an outcast to a legendary Spartan hero.
genres: Action role-playing game, Stealth, Open world

title: Batman: Arkham City
description: Become the Dark Knight in a sprawling open-world prison, fighting against Gotham's most notorious criminals.

title: Dark Souls III
description: A challenging action RPG set in a dark, dying world where survival depends on precise combat and exploration.
